title: Need the option to delete sub item questions from forms
excerpt:

posts.author: Ursoutherngrl (Elle Twon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a Form today and added a “subitem” question. Now it wont allow me to delete the question from the form. There was no data ever entered using this question and it still won’t allow me the option to delete.

It doesnt provide an option to delete the question from the form even if there was NO entry/data using that field. I do not simply want to HIDE the question - I want it gone.
GIVE US THE OPTION TO DELETE SUB ITEM QUESTIONS FROM THE FORM.

posts.author: SteveAG (Steve)
posts.cookedHtml: Even though this is sitting in a Beta version we should still be able to delete it, not just hide it! Hopefully others see this and raise it up the priority list as it should be a quick fix
